- ✅ 11/11 repos clean, on main, no drift
  
  [0m[1mTwo gaps found:[0m
  - [0m[38;5;12mquota [0mresolves to macOS system tool, not [0m[38;5;12mquota-core [0mCLI — needs PATH fix or [0m[38;5;12mgo build [0m+ install
  - cocoindex only indexes firstmate; embed server needs context config change
  
  The system is clean and verifiable. Ready to route work to secondmates — just say which domain.

[0m[38;5;15m⏺ [0mCaptain. Three things broken:

  [0m[1m1. Cursor — [0m[1m[38;5;12mcu[0m[1m is shadowed by macOS UUCP. [0m[38;5;12m/usr/bin/cu [0mis the Unix [0m[38;5;12mcu [0m(Call Up) command from 1991 — a serial terminal tool, not Cursor Agent. The real Cursor is at [0m[38;5;12m~/.local/bin/cursor [0mand
  [0m[38;5;12m~/.local/bin/cursor-agent[0m. [0m[38;5;12mcu[0m as a launcher shortcut is dead. The [0m[38;5;12mcursor [0mharness name in [0m[38;5;12mfm-spawn.sh[0m works fine — it's just the [0m[38;5;12mcu[0m alias that's broken.

  [0m[1m2. [0m[1m[38;5;12mquota[0m[1m — macOS disk quota tool shadowing ours. [0m[38;5;12m/usr/bin/quota [0mdisplays filesystem disk usage quotas. quota-core's CLI is called [0m[38;5;12mquota [0mtoo — same name — and macOS's wins because it's earlier on PATH. Fix:
  rename or install quota-core's binary as [0m[38;5;12mquotac[0m or put [0m[38;5;12m~/.local/bin [0mfirst on PATH.

  [0m[1m3. Cocoindex — paths added, index never built. [0mThe task DID add all projects to [0m[38;5;12minclude_paths [0m— I can see dotfiles, btw-world-state-research, quota-core, treehouse, mintmux, no-mistakes, voice-engine-swift all
  listed. But the actual indexing (embedding chunks) failed because CodeRankEmbed on :8082 rejects chunks bigger than 2048 tokens with 500 errors. The crewmate tried to fix it but ran out of context.
 
  The fix per learnings.md: [0m[38;5;12mmax_chars: 2500[0m in cocoindex config (calibrated to stay under 2048 tokens even at worst-case code density). Then restart the daemon.
 
  Want me to queue a crewmate to fix all three — rename quota binary, fix cursor alias, and reset cocoindex with the right max_chars?
